common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted entities to trigger on.

changed.description: Triggers after one or more relative humidity values change.

above.description: Only trigger when relative humidity is above this value.
above.name: Above

below.description: Only trigger when relative humidity is below this value.
below.name: Below

changed.name: Relative humidity changed

crossed_threshold.description: Triggers after one or more relative humidity values cross a threshold.

lower_limit.description: The lower limit of the threshold.
lower_limit.name: Lower limit

threshold_type.description: The type of threshold to use.
threshold_type.name: Threshold type

upper_limit.description: The upper limit of the threshold.
upper_limit.name: Upper limit

crossed_threshold.name: Relative humidity crossed threshold
